name: In LA, can I join other publishers suing Perplexity AI?
description: Possible class if common issues; watch WSJ case.[2]

mainEntity.name: In LA, can I join other publishers suing Perplexity AI?

acceptedAnswer.text: Possible class if common issues; watch WSJ case.[2]
acceptedAnswer.description: Class actions possible if common scraping harms; monitor WSJ/NY Post suit for consolidation.[2] Key factors: numerosity, typicality, CA jurisdiction (Perplexity HQ).[2] Individual suits faster; CA federal court viable. Check dockets for opt-in opportunities.
